commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: - [P1] No automation repair is appropriate; the remaining blocker is contributor-supplied real behavior proof from their environment.; Cleared: The current diff preserves the agent/operator config trust boundary and adds a fail-closed local restart preflight; I found no concrete new security or supply-chain concern. (sha=526a37f248b136bef8e4fafb5d4ddeb197a4e01f)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a local gateway config snapshot preflight before agent-triggered restart and regression coverage for invalid snapshots, caller gateway override isolation, and protected media model routing fields.

PR surface: Source +34, Tests +105. Total +139 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. by source inspection: current main schedules a local restart once restart is enabled, while the PR adds a config.get preflight that refuses invalid or unreadable local snapshots. I did not run runtime tests because this is a read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] No automation repair is appropriate; the remaining blocker is contributor-supplied real behavior proof from their environment.

target.title: fix(agents): harden gateway config self-edits
target.body:
Summary:
- Keep agent-facing gateway config self-edits within the existing narrow trust boundary; global media/model routing remains operator-owned.
- Validate the local gateway config snapshot before scheduling a restart, refusing restart when the snapshot cannot be loaded or is invalid.
- Add regression coverage for restart preflight failures, caller gateway override isolation, and protected media model routing fields.

Tests:
- node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.agents-core.config.ts src/agents/openclaw-gateway-tool.test.ts
- node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.unit-fast.config.ts src/agents/tools/gateway-tool-guard-coverage.test.ts
- node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.core.json src/agents/tools/gateway-tool.ts

## Real behavior proof

Redacted TencentCloud OpenClaw gateway check after operator-owned config repair and restart:

```text
# time
2026-06-04T21:18:36+08:00
# user service
active
MainPID=1782296
ActiveState=active
SubState=running
# listening
127.0.0.1:10130
[::1]:10130
# sanitized config model routing
agents.defaults.model.primary = custom/mimo-v2.5-pro
agents.defaults.model.fallbacks = [deepseek/deepseek-v4-flash]
agents.defaults.imageModel.primary = custom/mimo-v2-omni
target.author: daozheyuanxi

commands.reason: PR is not opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
